---
id: federation-pull-facts
title: "Pull replication endpoint"
description: "Returns scope-filtered, HLC-cursor-paginated facts for federation pull replication. Requires a valid peer token (`Authorization: Bearer <peer-token>`). Facts are filtered to the intersection of the peer's `allowed_scopes` (from registration) and the token's `scopes` field. `local` and `team` scopes are excluded unless `STIGMEM_FEDERATION_ALLOW_TEAM=true`. See spec §5.8, §6.3."
sidebar_label: "Pull replication endpoint"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/api/generated/stigmem-reference-node
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Pull replication endpoint"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/federation/facts"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns scope-filtered, HLC-cursor-paginated facts for federation pull replication. Requires a valid peer token (`Authorization: Bearer <peer-token>`). Facts are filtered to the intersection of the peer's `allowed_scopes` (from registration) and the token's `scopes` field. `local` and `team` scopes are excluded unless `STIGMEM_FEDERATION_ALLOW_TEAM=true`. See spec §5.8, §6.3.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
